ddls:
CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number of the mission */,
  "mission_date" TEXT /* Date of the mission */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target of the mission */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft used in the mission */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crew involved in the mission */,
  "mission_status" TEXT /* Status of the mission (e.g., completed, aborted) */,
  "mission_report_file" TEXT /* File path to the mission report */,
  "mission_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the mission (e.g., bombing, reconnaissance) */,
  "mission_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the mission */,
  "mission_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_mission_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_type_id") REFERENCES mission_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_mission_status FOREIGN KEY ("mission_status") REFERENCES mission_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crews ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target */,
  "target_location" TEXT /* Location of the target */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Description of the target */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of the target (e.g., industrial, military) */,
  "target_importance" TEXT /* Importance of the target (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of the aircraft (e.g., bomber, fighter) */,
  "aircraft_model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_registration" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_status" TEXT /* Status of the aircraft (e.g., active, lost, retired) */,
  "aircraft_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_production_date" TEXT /* Production date of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_aircraft_type FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_type") REFERENCES aircraft_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crews" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew */,
  "crew_commander" TEXT /* Name of the crew commander */,
  "crew_type" TEXT /* Type of the crew (e.g., bomber, fighter) */,
  "crew_status" TEXT /* Status of the crew (e.g., active, decommissioned) */,
  "crew_experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the crew (e.g., number of missions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crews_crew_type FOREIGN KEY ("crew_type") REFERENCES crew_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crew the member belongs to */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "member_role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (e.g., pilot, navigator) */,
  "member_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the crew member (e.g., Captain, Lieutenant) */,
  "member_status" TEXT /* Status of the crew member (e.g., active, injured, MIA) */,
  "member_experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the crew member (e.g., number of missions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_members_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crews ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission type (e.g., bombing, reconnaissance) */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the mission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission status (e.g., completed, aborted) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the mission status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft type (e.g., bomber, fighter) */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the aircraft type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew type (e.g., bomber, fighter) */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the crew type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission report */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the report belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the mission report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the mission report file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the mission report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the mission report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_reports_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theaters_of_war" (
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theater of war */,
  "theater_name" TEXT /* Name of the theater of war (e.g., European, Pacific) */,
  "theater_description" TEXT /* Description of the theater of war */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_theaters" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theater of war */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id", "theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user (e.g., read-only, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)
